name: Roundtop Machinery Industries Co., Ltd.
summary: Roundtop Machinery Industries Co., Ltd. designs and manufactures machine tools in Taiwan and internationally. The company provides vertical machining, high speed horizontal/vertical and horizontal machining, horizontal boring and milling, double column multi-axis/5-face machining, double column fixed/moving multi-axis/5-face machining, turning, and gantry type machining centers. It also offers slant-bed CNC super lathes; flat-bed CNC lathes and CNC screw cutting machines; and order-made machines. The company was founded in 1979 and is based in Taichung, Taiwan.
